title: DataStore
description: DataStore schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Cloud DSPM API

id.description: Unique data store identifier in Prisma Cloud.

name.description: Name of the data store as it appears in the cloud provider.

cloudProvider.description: Cloud provider where the data store is hosted.

cloudAccountId.description: Cloud account ID that owns the data store.

region.description: Cloud region where the data store is located.

serviceType.description: Category of the data store service.

serviceName.description: Specific cloud service name (e.g., Amazon S3, Amazon RDS).

encryptionEnabled.description: Whether encryption at rest is enabled.

isPubliclyAccessible.description: Whether the data store is accessible from the public internet.

riskLevel.description: Overall risk level computed from data sensitivity and security posture.

sensitiveDataCount.description: Number of sensitive data assets found in this data store.

classificationLabels.description: Distinct classification labels found in the data store.

dataAssetCount.description: Total number of data assets discovered in this data store.

discoveredAt.description: Timestamp when the data store was first discovered by DSPM.

lastScannedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent data classification scan.
